summary: De-mocked Platform Modules Testing Complete. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). All 4 de-mocked modules (Content, Compliance, Sponsorship, Contributors) return data_source='real' from MongoDB. Fixed frontend bug: apiCall was undefined, replaced with axios.get. Fixed 2 hardcoded fallback values in frontend.

ui_bugs.issue: FIXED: apiCall was not defined, replaced with axios.get
FIXED: Hardcoded '234' changed to use revenueAnalytics.contributors || '0'

critical_code_review_comments: All 4 de-mocked services correctly query MongoDB collections
content_manager_service.py: Queries user_content and label_assets collections
contributor_hub_service.py: Queries label_members, creator_profiles, royalty_earnings, payment_transactions
All endpoints return data_source='real' and success=true
No MongoDB _id fields appear in any response (verified by tests)
Router prefix correctly set to /platform (nested under /api prefix)
Analytics endpoints from iteration_114 still working (regression tests passed)
seed_data_creation: Using existing seeded data: user_content (8 docs), label_assets (12 docs), compliance_documents (1805 docs), compliance_audit_logs (51 docs), label_rights (1 doc), campaigns (12 docs), campaign_performance (9 docs), partnerships (8 docs), label_members (43 docs), creator_profiles (2 docs), royalty_earnings (955 docs), payment_transactions (4 docs)

Frontend displays real data from MongoDB. Test credentials: owner@bigmannentertainment.com / Test1234!. Auth returns 'access_token'. Comprehensive platform accessed at /comprehensive-platform route.
